mapper.select: SELECT t1.check_purpose checkPurpose, t2.com_name comName, t1.entrust_note entrustNote, t1.entrust_people entrustPeople, t1.entrust_people_phone entrustPeoplePhone, t3.entrust_type_name entrustType, t1.project_id projectId, t1.project_part projectPart, t1.report_get_way reportGetWay, t1.report_num reportNum, t1.sample_receive_way sampleReceiveWay, t1.witness_company_name witnessCompanyName, t1.witness_people witnessPeople FROM jt_entrust_info t1 LEFT JOIN company t2 ON t1.entrust_company_id = t2.com_id LEFT JOIN jt_entrust_type t3 ON t1.entrust_type = t3.entrust_type WHERE t1.entrust_number = #{entrustNumber}

SELECT t1.model_id modelId, t1.object_count objectCount, t1.product_company_name productCompanyName, t1.product_id productId, t1.product_number productNumber, t2.check_basis_code productStandardSource, t3.product_name productName, t4.sample_type sampleType, t4.sample_type_name sampleTypeName FROM jt_sample_object t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t1.product_id, t1.standard_id, t2.check_basis_code FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT product_id, standard_id FROM jt_entrust_check_item WHERE entrust_id = ( SELECT entrust_id FROM jt_entrust_info WHERE entrust_number = #{entrustNumber} ) ) t1 LEFT JOIN s_check_basis_code t2 ON t1.standard_id = t2.check_basis_id ) t2 ON t1.product_id = t2.product_id LEFT JOIN d_product_msg t3 ON t1.product_id = t3.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t1.sample_id, t2.sample_type, t2.sample_type_name FROM jt_sample_info t1 LEFT JOIN jt_sample_type t2 ON t1.sample_type = t2.sample_type WHERE entrust_id = ( SELECT entrust_id FROM jt_entrust_info WHERE entrust_number = #{entrustNumber} ) ) t4 ON t1.sample_object_id = t4.sample_id WHERE t1.sample_object_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT sample_Id FROM jt_entrust_check_item WHERE entrust_id = ( SELECT entrust_id FROM jt_entrust_info WHERE entrust_number = #{entrustNumber} ) )

SELECT T2.check_item_id checkItemId, T2.check_item_name checkItemName, T1.check_times checkTimes, T3.check_basis_id standardId, T1.product_id productId, T4.product_name productName, CONCAT( T3.check_basis_doc_name, ',', T3.check_basis_code ) standard FROM jt_entrust_check_item T1 LEFT JOIN d_product_check_item T2 ON T1.check_item_id = T2.check_item_id LEFT JOIN s_check_basis_code T3 ON T1.standard_id = T3.check_basis_id LEFT JOIN d_product_msg T4 ON T1.product_id = T4.product_id WHERE T1.entrust_id = ( SELECT entrust_id FROM jt_entrust_info WHERE entrust_number = #{entrustNumber} )

SELECT T1.check_item_id itemId, T1.check_item_name itemName, T2.cost itemCost FROM d_product_check_item T1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM d_product_cost WHERE product_id = #{productId}) T2 ON T1.check_item_id = T2.check_item_id WHERE is_valid = 1 AND T1.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT T1.check_basis_id value, CONCAT(T2.check_basis_code,',',T2.check_basis_doc_name) label FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT check_basis_id FROM d_product_check_basis_info WHERE product_id = #{productId} ) T1 LEFT JOIN s_check_basis_code T2 ON T1.check_basis_id = T2.check_basis_id

select DISTINCT a.sample_id As sampleId,a.sample_number As sampleCode,m.product_name As sampleName ,jri.flow_status As reportStat from jt_sample_info a left join d_product_msg m on a.product_id=m.product_id left join jt_report_info jri on a.sample_id = jri.sample_id where a.entrust_id=#{id}

SELECT DISTINCT count(a.entrust_id) from jt_entrust_info a left join jt_entrust_check_info c on a.entrust_id=c.entrust_id left join jt_sample_info s on s.entrust_id=a.entrust_id left join jt_report_info jri on s.sample_id = jri.sample_id where a.crm=#{adminId} AND jri.flow_status = 3

SELECT DISTINCT count(a.entrust_id) from jt_entrust_info a left join jt_entrust_check_info c on a.entrust_id=c.entrust_id left join jt_sample_info s on s.entrust_id=a.entrust_id left join jt_report_info jri on s.sample_id = jri.sample_id where a.crm=#{adminId} AND jri.flow_status != 3
